narrative:
Fostoria S (precinct in Hancock County) has 842 registered voters, with 59.0% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 21.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 19.2%, a modest Republican lean of 2.5 percentage points.
